section.div: An IP stack implementation for the TI-84+ CE derived from lwIP code. Implements custom memory management for <60K RAM, assembly optimizations, and a custom lightweight TLS stack engineered for the constraints of the system.
A standard-derived suite of cryptography libraries for the TI-84+ CE graphing calculator.
Little experiment with an almost AI-driven game design. Using latest Codex model, instructed on world and mechanics, AI was free to design game. Then I made it more cohesive.
